basis: Prescribed univariate stress tests for UCITS funds under VaR-method global exposure monitoring
notes: These scenarios reflect the CSSF UCITS regulatory framework for stress testing. Each scenario is applied independently to test the fund's sensitivity to single-factor market moves.

equity_markets_down_30.description: Simultaneous 30% decline across all equity positions

equity_markets_up_30.description: Simultaneous 30% appreciation across all equity positions

interest_rate_curves_up_200bps.description: Parallel upward shift of 200 basis points across all interest rate curves

credit_spreads_down_50pct.description: 50% proportional tightening of all credit spreads (not additive bps)
credit_spreads_down_50pct.notes: This is a multiplicative adjustment, not additive bps. For example, a 200 bps spread becomes 100 bps (200 * 0.50).

credit_spreads_up_100pct.description: 100% proportional widening of all credit spreads (not additive bps)
credit_spreads_up_100pct.notes: This is a multiplicative adjustment, not additive bps. For example, a 200 bps spread becomes 400 bps (200 * 2.00).

base_currency_depreciation_30.description: 30% depreciation of EUR against all other currencies

base_currency_appreciation_30.description: 30% appreciation of EUR against all other currencies
